etymology.description: 壴 (鼓, 'drum') + 彡 (visualization of the sound of drumming) = sound of drumming
etymology.interpretation: The character combines 壴(壴) (zhù, 'drum') and 彡(彡) (shān, 'visualization of the sound of drumming') to form the sound of drumming. This represents the reverberating sound produced by a drum, conveying a sense of volume and resonance which can also be metaphorically extended to imply magnification or resonance in other contexts.

parts.english: visualization of the sound of drumming

examples.chinese: 彭先生是一位著名的医生(彭先生是一位著名的醫生)。
examples.pinyin: Péng xiānsheng shì yī wèi zhùmíng de yīshēng.
examples.english: Mr. Peng is a renowned doctor.

examples.chinese: 她最近和彭女士一起工作(她最近和彭女士一起工作)。
examples.pinyin: Tā zuìjìn hé Péng nǚshì yīqǐ gōngzuò.
examples.english: She has been working with Ms. Peng recently.

examples.chinese: 彭家在这个社区很受欢迎(彭家在這個社區很受歡迎)。
examples.pinyin: Péng jiā zài zhège shèqū hěn shòu huānyíng.
examples.english: The Peng family is very popular in this community.
